sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current button state
ascii = current_frame.ascii
lines = ascii.split('\n')
print("Button tops (row 42):")
row42 = lines[42]
for col in [21, 26, 31, 36, 41]:
    print(f"  col {col}: {row42[col]}")
print("Button stems (row 46):")
row46 = lines[46]
for col in [21, 26, 31, 36, 41]:
    print(f"  col {col}: {row46[col]}")

# Try all w pattern
# Current tops: B/B/B/B/B
# Need to click all 5 to toggle to w
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 42, 'col': 21},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 42, 'col': 26},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 42, 'col': 31},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 42, 'col': 36},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 42, 'col': 41}
])

print("\nAfter toggling all:")
ascii = current_frame.ascii
lines = ascii.split('\n')
row42 = lines[42]
for col in [21, 26, 31, 36, 41]:
    print(f"  col {col}: {row42[col]}")

# Submit
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 55, 'col': 31}])
print("\nResult:", last_action_result)
print("Level:", current_frame.level)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
